title: Keyboard shortcuts for Phone Link
license_note: Screenshots from support.microsoft.com. Confirm redistribution with your legal team before use in a shipped product.

steps.text: Select the More options (…) button in the upper-right corner of Microsoft Teams, and then select Keyboard shortcuts .

To navigate to the keyboard shortcuts with a screen reader, press the Tab key until you hear " More options " then press Enter . Press the Down arrow key until you hear " Keyboard shortcuts ," then press Enter .

On Samsung and certain Android devices, there are four features available: Messages, Calls, Apps, and Photos, in that order. To navigate to each of these features, press CTRL and the corresponding number of each feature. For example, to open Apps, press Ctrl + 3.

On other devices such as iOS, there may be fewer features available, such as Messages and Calls only. To navigate to these features, similarly, press CTRL and the corresponding number of each feature: Ctrl + 1 for Messages and Ctrl + 2 for Calls.
